name: Dielectric Isolation Padlock — Keyed Management System
shortDescription: Glass-fibre nylon padlock with anti-corrosion carbide-steel shackle for formal LOTO key control.
longDescription: Built for sites running a structured lockout programme rather than ad-hoc padlocks — a 6-level keyed management system supporting differ-key (one worker, one key), alike-key and master-key configurations (2 keys per lock plus 1 master key per 10 locks). The glass-fibre reinforced nylon body is waterproof and anti-corrosion treated, with an anti-skid grip that works with gloves on, and a key-retaining shackle that can't be left unlocked and walked away from.

images.alt: Dielectric Isolation Padlock — Keyed Management System supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Shackle
specs.value: Heavy coated carbide steel (dielectric nylon shackle variant available)

specs.label: Key system
specs.value: Differ key / alike key / master + differ
